data.text/markdown: PyTorch in marimo

Rich model display (marimo ≥ 0.20)

Just output an nn.Module — marimo renders it as a collapsible tree with color-coded layer types, frozen layers dimmed, and trainable parameter counts inline. Hover a layer to see its docstring.
